product_depth.justification: Both review loops implement approve/modify/restart with re-spawn and blocking semantics. Strong for scope; no iteration limit or timeout behavior specified.

functionality.justification: All 15 feature steps across F-037 (6), F-038 (7), F-039 (2) fully addressed. No gaps, no missing semantics.

visual_design.justification: Clean section headers, consistent bold-option formatting, correct step numbering. CLAUDE.md section is concise. Minor structural variance in CLAUDE.md list style.

code_quality.justification: Surgical changes to 3 markdown files only. No scripts/schemas/roles touched. Step references internally consistent. Sprint Resume table correct. No cross-reference validation for future step changes.

contract_checks.evidence: start.md lines 30-38: review loop shows spec content (Overview, Shipped Scope, Execution Strategy, Security Context) and presents approve/modify/start-over options.
session.md lines 73-81: review loop shows proposal content (Goal, Deliverables, Verification, Contract Checks) and presents approve/modify/re-propose options.
Both loops contain 'This loop repeats until the user approves. Do NOT proceed/send without explicit approval.'
Sprint Resume table: idle=1, contract=6, implementation=11, evaluation=12. All match new step numbering.
CLAUDE.md lines 85-93: Interactive Review Points section documents spec review (/start 5-6) and contract review (/session 7-8) with plan mode contamination rationale.
git diff HEAD~1 --name-only shows only start.md, session.md, CLAUDE.md, and harness state artifacts. No scripts, schemas, role files, or agent definitions changed.

non_blocking_issues: Neither review loop specifies behavior if user abandons mid-loop (Sprint Resume handles this implicitly but not explicitly stated).

feature_evidence.reason: All 6 steps verified. Review loop between planner and initializer with spec content display, 3 options, re-spawn on modify, blocking semantics, consistent step numbering.

All 7 steps verified. Review loop between generator and evaluator with proposal content display, 3 options, re-spawn on modify, blocking semantics, updated Sprint Resume table, preserved evaluator review.
Both steps verified. CLAUDE.md has Interactive Review Points section documenting both loops with step references and rationale.

non_blocking: Neither review loop specifies behavior on mid-loop abandonment. Sprint Resume at 'contract' phase handles this implicitly.

internal_consistency.justification: Both review loops use identical structure: show artifact, 3 options, loop until approve, blocking language. CLAUDE.md step references match command files.

intentionality.justification: Changes target the specific plan mode contamination problem. Builder report documents project-specific choices (removing redundant step, choosing spec sections to display).

craft.justification: Consistent markdown formatting, clean section headers, correct step numbering with no gaps or duplicates. Sprint Resume table correctly updated.

fitness_for_purpose.justification: An agent following start.md or session.md can execute review loops without ambiguity. Each option has clear next-step instructions.
